features: Parses errors and warnings from godot.log and validation output
Extracts file paths from error messages
Exit code reflects validation status (0 = pass, 1 = fail)

tasks_completed.title: Integrate validate.bat Step 0 into cycle completion

changes: Added validation step AFTER Claude CLI execution
Added validation step BEFORE marking worker as 'done'
Worker status set to 'error' if validation fails
Worker status set to 'done' only if validation passes
Validation results written to test_results.json automatically
Graceful fallback if validation script not found
workflow: 2. If CLI exit code = 0, run generate_test_results.ps1
3. If validation fails (exit code != 0), set status='error'
4. If validation passes (exit code = 0), set status='done'

patterns_used: Exit code propagation for pipeline control

testing_notes.manual_testing: To test: run worker.ps1 for any domain, validation will run automatically
testing_notes.expected_behavior: Worker cannot be 'done' if validation detects errors

integration_points: worker.ps1 calls generate_test_results.ps1 after task completion
notify.ps1 sends validation results to orchestrator
test_results.json consumed by review workers and Game Director
